summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LearnAfrikaans language learning app. All backend APIs working perfectly (20/20 tests passed). Frontend features functional with minor session management issues. Registration flow, dashboard, lessons, quiz, chatbot, and leaderboard all working as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: Sessions expire quickly causing frequent redirects to login page

integration_issues.issue: AI-powered quiz generation takes 8+ seconds, may timeout on slower connections

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with streak, points, rank, word of day
Lessons page shows topics based on skill level
Quiz topic selection and question display
Leaderboard with all-time and weekly tabs
All 20 backend API endpoints (100% pass rate)
Word of the day with pronunciation
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider increasing JWT token expiration time to improve user experience during longer learning sessions. Current short expiration causes frequent login redirects.
